title.en: Qiankun Bay in the Jin-Shaan Yellow River Gorge

annotation.en: Among all the recovered photos, this is the only image that appears to show the photographer himself — a man standing on a cliff above the Yellow River, gazing out over Qiankun Bay. He may be Yellow River Lensman (黄河影人).
annotation.zh: 在所有找回的照片中，这是唯一一张像是摄影师本人的影像——一位男子站在黄河峡谷的崖壁上，俯瞰乾坤湾。他很可能就是「黄河影人」。
